advancements.tinyfuel.tiny_fuel.title: Fuel Efficiency
advancements.tinyfuel.tiny_fuel.descript: A smaller than normal fuel, allowing more precise burning. (This advancement also acts to let others know tiny fuels is installed).
advancements.tinyfuel.mini_fuel.title: Time To Get Smaller
advancements.tinyfuel.mini_fuel.descript: I know you wanted more precision in your burning, but isn't this a step too far?
advancements.tinyfuel.micro_fuel.title: Why Though?
advancements.tinyfuel.micro_fuel.descrip: I get exact control is your thing, but wouldn't you agree that this is getting ridiculous?
advancements.tinyfuel.nano_fuel.title: Splitting The Atom
advancements.tinyfuel.nano_fuel.descript:
You were so preoccupied with whether or not you could, you didn't stop to think if you should...

200 of these and for what, a single iron?
